seed_instruction: Write a email to your professor to ask for an extention on a project due in two days.
org_constraint: The phrase "I sincerely apologize" must appear exactly once.
new_constraint: The phrase "I sincerely apologize" must appear exactly twice.
instruction: Write a email to your professor to ask for an extention on a project due in two days. The phrase "I sincerely apologize" must appear exactly once. The phrase "I sincerely apologize" must appear exactly twice.
response:
Subject: Extension Request - [Your Name] - [Course Name] Project

Dear Professor [Professor's Last Name],

I am writing to respectfully request a short extension on the [Project Name] project, which is currently due in two days, on [Original Due Date].

I have been making good progress on the assignment, but I have encountered [briefly and professionally state the reason for the delay—e.g., an unexpected family matter, a heavier than anticipated workload this week, a technical issue with the data collection]. This has unfortunately set back my timeline more than I anticipated.

**I sincerely apologize** for the late notice and any inconvenience this request may cause to your grading schedule. I am committed to submitting high-quality work, and I believe an extra [State the exact number of days you need, e.g., 48 hours, until Friday] would allow me to finalize the project to the standard I aim for.

**I sincerely apologize** again for this delay. Would it be possible to submit the project by [Propose New Date and Time]?

Thank you very much for considering my request. I look forward to hearing from you at your convenience.

Best regards,

[Your Name]
[Your Student ID Number]<turn|>
